title: polygala arvicola
intro: Polygala arvicola, also known as Korean milk vetch or Arvicola polygala, is a perennial flowering plant species belonging to the milkwort family. The plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, particularly its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory activities. The health benefits of Polygala arvicola include its potential to reduce blood sugar levels, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit neuroprotective effects. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and used as a decoction or tea, and can also be made into capsules or extracts for easier consumption.
